name: ikuyo Co.,Ltd.
summary: ikuyo Co.,Ltd. manufactures and sells resin parts for automobiles in Japan. It offers automobile exterior and interior equipment, and molded products, as well as processes and sells rubber products. The company was formerly known as Ikuyo Coating Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ikuyo Co., Ltd. in April 1974. The company was founded in 1947 and is headquartered in Atsugi, Japan.
